title: centaurium uliginosum
intro: Centaurium uliginosum, also known as marsh centaury, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Gentianaceae family, typically found in wet meadows and marshlands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its rich content of iridoids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Centaurium uliginosum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Centaurium uliginosum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
